case_title: ANNABELLE D. ABRIGO VS. COUNTRYWIDE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABRIGO, ANNABELLE D. SERVED JUL-23-2013, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT COUNTRYWIDE, INC.
OPPOSITION TO DEFTS DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABRIGO, ANNABELLE D.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., RECONSTRUST COMPANY, N.A. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 22, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 20, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. RECONSTRUST COMPANY, N.A. HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC. AND BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT, PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 8.10 TO BE HEARD ON OCTOBER 22, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. JUDGE: LESLIE C. NICHOLS, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/LCN)

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC AND BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND (1) AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE TO ALLEGE FACTS SHOWING THAT PURPORTED ROBO-SIGNERS DID NOT HAVE AUTHORITY TO SIGN IN THIS CASE; TO ALLEGE PREJUDICE; AND TO ALLEGE TENDER OF EXCEPTION FROM TENDER; AND (2) AS TO SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR B&P 17200 VIOLATION TO ALLEGE ALL ELEMENTS OF THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 2-5 CAUSES OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE RONALD EVANS QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-08-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
